digest.greeting: Jean, today moved several dashboard items out of the open lane, especially portfolio follow-ups, PM notes, quality prep, access review, and Rippling cleanup. The remaining carry-forward work is tighter now: the BA/Nicolas path, PM operating structure, LA AI testing, Eugenia's PE/SOP send, and the Mental Health charter check.

items.label: Advanced the portfolio follow-up stack
items.detail: The BD owner follow-ups, Maria/Jhara roadblock loop, Legal portfolio review, Levelpath answer, and Marketing portfolio-review conflict are all checked off for today.

items.label: Sent the PM meeting notes
items.detail: The reminder to send yesterday's PM meeting notes to the PM group is checked off.

items.label: Asked Janet about the BA process
items.detail: The specific reminder to ask Janet how to request a BA for a project already assigned to a PM is complete; the broader Nicolas BA request still needs a final answer below.

items.label: Completed the Quality engagement prep
items.detail: The Quality Planning Process prep item is checked off after today's planning block.

items.label: Reviewed Laura Urena's ChatGPT access request
items.detail: The Halo approval gate for Laura Urena's LLF workspace access is checked off.

items.label: Cleared the Rippling overdue-task follow-up
items.detail: The overdue Rippling task follow-up is checked off for today.

items.label: Resolve the BA ask for Nicolas's Owner and Timestamp project
items.detail: Use Janet's BA-process answer to decide how a BA should be requested for Nicolas's project, then turn that into reusable guidance for similar assigned-PM projects.

items.label: Turn the PM team index, Planner, and weekly deck into one operating structure
items.detail: Keep shaping the Loop index, Planner updates, and weekly deck into one usable operating rhythm instead of three disconnected work surfaces.

items.label: Start LA AI change-management testing
items.detail: The reminder to begin testing LA AI for change management is still open.

items.label: Send Eugenia the PE project list and SOP template
items.detail: Send Eugenia the PE project list plus the agreed SOP template so the expected level of detail is clear.

items.label: Check the Mental Health Expansion charter deliverable
items.detail: Confirm whether Maria's draft project charter is ready for stakeholder review or needs an owner/date adjustment.

items.label: Bonus Restructure support block was canceled
items.detail: Thiago said the project go/no-go decision moved to next week and that he will reschedule once the new date is decided.

items.label: 1:1 Laura & Jean
items.detail: One-off timing before the recurring series starts next week. Good place to close any remaining Levelpath or access context.

items.label: Amazon Connect Weekly Project Sync
items.detail: Agenda includes open items, blockers, prior-week action items, and decisions needed.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Regular BCP/IR touchpoint. Tessa is declined, so confirm whether any incident-guide or survey decisions need async follow-up.

items.label: Marketing Initial Project Portfolio Review
items.detail: Paige is declined while Lucia and Amy are accepted/tentative. Decide whether to proceed or reschedule for Paige coverage.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team forum for project progress, roadblocks, and strategic coordination.
